name: getFirstCANdbName
title: getFirstCANdbName
syntax: dword getFirstCANdbName( char buffer[], dword size)
description: Finds out the name of the first assigned database.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the database name is written.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in Byte.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
